excellent.description: CNN architecture correctly implemented with all required layers (Conv2D, MaxPooling, Dense). Model compiles and trains successfully.

good.description: CNN mostly correct with minor issues. Trains but may have small architectural errors.

needs_improvement.description: Significant architectural issues or model doesn't train properly.

incomplete.description: Model not implemented or major errors prevent execution.

excellent.description: Includes all 7 required visualizations: sample digits, class distribution, training history, confusion matrix, predictions, error analysis, comparison.
Clean code, good variable names, comments explaining key steps, well-organized notebook.

good.description: Mostly clean code with some documentation.

needs_improvement.description: Poor code quality, lack of comments, disorganized.

criteria.description: Implements deeper CNN with batch normalization, progressive dropout, and multiple conv blocks.
Correctly implements and applies ImageDataGenerator with multiple augmentation techniques.
Achieves target accuracy on CIFAR-10 test set.
Includes training curves, confusion matrix, per-class accuracy, sample predictions.
Well-documented code with explanations of architectural choices.
Implements both phases: feature extraction (frozen) and fine-tuning (unfrozen top layers) with appropriate learning rates.
Correctly loads VGG16, adds custom classifier, compiles with appropriate parameters.
Achieves >90% validation accuracy through transfer learning.
Compares phase 1 vs phase 2 performance, visualizes training history.
Clean, well-documented code with clear explanations.
Successfully implements face detection using Haar Cascades with bounding boxes.
Implements webcam real-time face detection (or demonstrates understanding if hardware unavailable).
Demonstrates understanding of YOLO architecture and differences from Haar Cascades.
Compares classical vs deep learning methods for object detection.
Well-documented with explanations of IoU, NMS concepts.
Uses VGG16 or similar for medical image classification.
Implements class weights or oversampling to handle imbalanced dataset.
Achieves >85% recall (critical for medical diagnosis - catching pneumonia cases).
Demonstrates understanding of medical implications: FN vs FP costs, ROC curve analysis.
Includes confusion matrix, ROC curve, sample predictions with X-ray images.
Implements transfer learning using MobileNetV2 for fast inference.
Completes both feature extraction and fine-tuning phases.
Achieves >85% accuracy despite limited data.
Measures and reports inference time (<100ms for production readiness).
Discusses production deployment: FP/FN costs, ROI, real-time requirements.

general_guidelines.code_execution: Code must run without errors for full credit
general_guidelines.plagiarism: Zero tolerance - cite sources, use own implementations
general_guidelines.partial_credit: Partial credit available for incomplete work showing understanding
general_guidelines.resubmission: One resubmission allowed within 1 week for up to 80% credit
